% check a.php
a.php:4:8: class method Repo::notExist does not exist

% check b.php
b.php:18:3: $u is of type: Admin (DEBUG)

-- a.php --
<?php

$repo = new Repo;
$repo->notExist()->doesNotExistEither();
$repo->get()->doesNotExistEither();
-- d.php --
<?php

class Repo
{
	public function get()
	{
	}
}
-- b.php --
<?php

class User
{
}

class Admin extends User
{
}

class Foo
{
	/**
	 * @param Admin $u
	 */
	function accept(User $u)
	{
		#debugType $u
	}
}
